title: HUNTDOWN
source: Official Steam store trailer 'Huntdown Launch Trailer' (movies[0], HLS h264), frame-grabbed with ffmpeg fps=1
scope: MOTION: grounds hit-feedback juice (combat text, damage numbers, kill-streaks), explosion + blood particles, enemy density IN MOTION (dims 2, 4, 5). NOT precise cadence — see CAP-2.

2-player co-op firing (muzzle flashes), night city skyline + helicopter, pickups
peak feedback: DOUBLE KILL!/WEAPONS COMBO!/EXPLOSIVE! text + damage numbers + explosion + blood spray + kill-streak counter
